author: hiyouga
description:
LLaMA Factory is a comprehensive framework for fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) with support for over 100 models. It provides a user-friendly web interface and powerful training methods including LoRA, QLoRA, and full-parameter training.

**Key Features:**
- Support for 100+ LLMs including LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen, and more
- Multiple fine-tuning methods (LoRA, QLoRA, Full, Freeze)
- Intuitive Web UI for easy model management
- Built-in API server for model inference
- Multi-GPU training support
- Quantization and model export capabilities

**Hardware Requirements:**
- GPU: NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support required

**Learn More:**
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory)
- [Documentation](https://llamafactory.readthedocs.io/)

releaseNotes.en_US:
- v0.9.4 updates the project name from LLaMA-Factory to LlamaFactory.
- Older Python runtimes are deprecated; the supported Python runtime range was raised.
- Installation moved from pip to uv, and new training support includes OFT, Semantic Initialization, Megatron-LM, KTransformers, MPO, FP8, and TRL 0.24.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- v0.9.4 updates the project name from LLaMA-Factory to LlamaFactory.

releaseNotes.it_IT:

- I runtime Python precedenti sono deprecati; l'intervallo di runtime Python supportato è stato aumentato.
- L'installazione è stata spostata da pip a uv e il nuovo supporto per la formazione include OFT, inizializzazione semantica, Megatron-LM, KTransformers, MPO, FP8 e TRL 0.24.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:

- Installasjonen flyttet fra pip til uv, og ny opplæringsstøtte inkluderer OFT, semantisk initialisering, Megatron-LM, KTransformers, MPO, FP8 og TRL 0.24.

title: LLaMA Factory(Nvidia GPU)
